author: Erik Hänel
changelog:
2026-03-30 v0.0.2: Submission automation
  + Added tools for fork and branch creation
  + Added tools for automatic PR submission

2026-06-10 v0.0.1: Initial version
  - Provides a procedure for manifest cration
  - Provides a procedure for copying a package to the correct folder structure
description: Provides tools to simplify the release process to the official repository during the package creation. It contains also a solution for a simplified package submission via the GitHub REST API. You still need a valid AuthToken, though. The link for the generation of the auth token can be found in the procedure docstring for $packaging~submit()
name: Packaging Tools
